summary: Tested new POS features: Customer Family Selection, Phone Blacklist System, and Debt Reminders. All 7 requested features working correctly. Backend APIs all passing (13/13 tests). Frontend UI components verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/blacklist - Returns list of blacklisted phones
Backend: POST /api/blacklist - Adds phone to blacklist
Backend: Duplicate phone detection returns 400 error
Backend: POST /api/customers with family_id - Associates customer with family
Frontend: Add Customer Dialog opens with data-testid='add-customer-btn'
Frontend: Family Selection dropdown visible with label 'عائلة الزبون'
Frontend: Plus (+) button present to add new family inline
Frontend: Blacklist warning displays when entering blacklisted phone (0555123456)
Frontend: Warning text: 'هذا الرقم في القائمة السوداء!'
Frontend: Complete Sale button present with data-testid='complete-sale-btn'
Frontend: Complete Sale button disabled when cart is empty
critical_code_review_comments: Code implementation is solid with proper data-testid attributes
Blacklist warning provides good UX feedback in real-time
Family selection with inline add is user-friendly design
seed_data_creation: Blacklisted phone already exists: 0555123456 (reason: نصاب - عدم الدفع). Customer family: زبائن VIP
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Customer family selection dropdown in Add Customer dialog with + button to add new family inline, 2) Phone blacklist system - GET/POST/DELETE /api/blacklist APIs working, warning shows in dialog when entering blacklisted phone, 3) Debt reminders API working (/api/debt-reminders/pending). Test phone in blacklist: 0555123456. Complete sale button works correctly (disabled when cart empty, enabled when items added).

Add Customer Dialog - Family Selection.details: Family dropdown with 'عائلة الزبون' label shows list of families, default 'بدون عائلة'

Add Customer Dialog - Add New Family But.details: Plus (+) button next to family dropdown allows inline creation of new family

Blacklist API - GET /api/blacklist.details: Returns array of blacklisted phones with id, phone, reason, notes, added_by, created_at

Blacklist API - POST /api/blacklist.details: Adds new phone to blacklist, returns 400 if duplicate

Blacklist Warning in Add Customer Dialog.details: Red warning 'هذا الرقم في القائمة السوداء!' shows when entering blacklisted phone 0555123456

Debt Reminders API - GET /api/debt-remin.details: Returns list of customers with pending debt reminders (currently empty - no customers with debt)

Complete Sale Button.details: Button with data-testid='complete-sale-btn', disabled when cart empty, shows 'تأكيد البيع (Ctrl+Enter)'
